2605.03228.title: MAGE: Safeguarding LLM Agents against Long-Horizon Threats via Shadow Memory
2605.03228.paper_summary: As large language model (LLM)-powered agents are increasingly deployed to perform complex, real-world tasks, they face a growing class of attacks that exploit extended user-agent-environment interactions to pursue malicious objectives improbable in single-turn settings. Such long-horizon threats pose significant risks to the safe deployment of LLM agents in critical domains. In this paper, we present MAGE (Memory As Guardrail Enforcement), a novel defensive framework designed to counter a wide range of long-horizon threats. Inspired by the "shadow stack" abstraction in systems security, MAGE maintains a dedicated, safety-focused agentic memory that distills and retains safety-critical context across the agent's full execution trajectory, leveraging this shadow memory to proactively assess the risk of pending actions prior to their execution. Extensive evaluation demonstrates that MAGE substantially outperforms existing defenses across diverse long-horizon threats in detection accuracy, achieves early-stage detection for the majority of attacks, and introduces only negligible overhead to agent utility. To our best knowledge, MAGE represents the first framework to detect and mitigate long-horizon threats using an agentic memory approach, establishing a new paradigm for this critical challenge and opening promising directions for future research.
2605.03228.paper_summary_zh: 隨著大型語言模型（LLM）驅動的代理越來越多地被部署來執行複雜的現實世界任務，它們面臨著一類日益增長的攻擊，這些攻擊利用擴展的用戶代理環境互動來追求在單次回合設置中不太可能實現的惡意目標。這些長期威脅對於在關鍵領域安全部署LLM代理構成了重大風險。在本文中，我們提出了MAGE（記憶作為護欄執行），這是一種新穎的防禦框架，旨在對抗各種長期威脅。受到系統安全中“影子堆棧”抽象的啟發，MAGE維護了一個專門的、安全為重點的代理記憶，該記憶在代理的完整執行軌跡中提煉並保留安全關鍵的上下文，利用這個影子記憶在執行之前主動評估待執行行動的風險。廣泛的評估表明，MAGE在檢測準確性方面顯著超越現有的防禦，對大多數攻擊實現了早期檢測，並且對代理效用僅引入了微不足道的開銷。據我們所知，MAGE代表了第一個使用代理記憶方法來檢測和減輕長期威脅的框架，為這一關鍵挑戰建立了一個新的範式，並為未來的研究開辟了有希望的方向。
2605.03228.author: Yuhui Wang et.al.
2605.03228.authors: Yuhui Wang, Tanqiu Jiang, Jiacheng Liang, Charles Fleming, Ting Wang
